warnings: This building cross-section (รูปตัด 1) cuts through ห้องน้ำ1, พักผ่อน, and ห้องน้ำ2 along the grid row (roughly parallel to D-E), in the 4-3-2-1 direction; roof framing itself is deferred to the structural drawings (outside this extraction's architecture-only page range).
Sibling section รูปตัด 2 is in _หน้า10_section2.json.

New level datums +5.05 (ระดับหลังเสาบน) and +4.05 (ระดับหลังเสาล่าง) appear on this sheet for the first time in the extraction — not seen on the roof plan (A-05) or elevations (A-06/A-07), which only referenced +3.75/+3.65. Read faithfully as printed but not reconciled against roof slope geometry; likely internal roof-post/purlin top levels above the +3.75 wall-beam line, flagged for human review if precise roof-height coordination is needed.
Interior fixture wall-height dims (2.70m) match exactly what is independently confirmed on the WC.1/WC.2 detail sheets (A-10/A-11/A-12/A-13).
